title: Record a token-efficiency improvement contract
prompt: Create reports/token-efficiency-contract.md with sections for Context ladder, Tool budgets, Research defaults, Proof path, and Rollback note.

fixtureActions.content:
# Token Efficiency Contract

## Context ladder
micro40/keep2/min4 · async1 · handoff16 · soft3 · maxRecent3 · reserved3k · spec800 · recompact1.0 · pblock6/3 · hard50 · abs34k

## Tool budgets
tool results 150/2 · command preview 4 · result preview 1 · thinking glance 1 · swarm 100/3k/inline20 · grep head 6

## Research defaults
WebSearch defaults to 3 hits; sharpen query before raising limit; FetchURL for primary sources

## Proof path
focused vitest + /bench loop evidence under .superliora/bench

## Rollback note
revert denser defaults if routing or recall quality regresses
